=Index of types=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="button_labels"| type Calendar.button_labels >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Calendar >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An instance of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|button~_labels>> is used to customize the button
    labels~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox_position"| type Form.checkbox_position >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox_style"| type Form.checkbox_style >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="cropping"| type Picture_uploader.cropping >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="intl"| type Calendar.intl >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Calendar >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|intl>> is the type of internationalization specifiers~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="react_component"| type Form.react_component >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive component~: a signal and its setter~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="service"| type Picture_uploader.service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|a service that implements a function with type <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~'a ~-~> ~'b>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="simple_stop"| type Tongue.simple_stop >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tongue >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="state"| type Pulltorefresh.state >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Pulltorefresh >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Represents the state of the gesture behavior~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="stop"| type Tongue.stop >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tongue >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Carousel.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|see <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="tongue"| type Tongue.tongue >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tongue >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Signals contain the current
    position of the tongue~, as a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|simple~_stop>> or as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|int>>~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="upload"| type Picture_uploader.upload >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>~]||
\\
